top_signals.title: IMF says tokenization could transform settlement and financial stability
top_signals.summary: The global lender says blockchain-based finance could streamline markets but warns that fragmented standards and regulations may create new systemic risks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Sandwich chain Jersey Mike’s files for IPO as Blackstone eyes windfall
top_signals.summary: Private equity group targets valuation of up to $12bn for purveyor of cheesesteaks and cold-cut heroes
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Olympian David Hearn indicted in Reflecting Pool destruction of property case
top_signals.summary: U.S. Attorney Jeanine Pirro said that David Hearn, by his "own admission ... reached down into the pool" to rip up sealant.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Healthcare group owned by Ardian has its bank accounts seized
top_signals.summary: Creditors told of investigation into Santé Cie and subsidiaries over dealings with healthcare professionals

top_signals.title: Apple plans five new iPhones through 2027, eyes Chinese-made chips amid foldable push, reports say
top_signals.summary: Apple is planning five new iPhones by 2027 and is considering Chinese memory suppliers as it expands foldable production, reports say.

top_signals.title: eToro leads $12.5 million round in onchain perps exchange Extended
top_signals.summary: "The partnership will focus on expanding access to global financial markets through next-generation on-chain infrastructure," eToro said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
